excluded: a claim that PhaseWrap replaces RoPE
a claim that a one-seed feasibility audit satisfies the five-seed promotion standard
supported: A no-credential feasibility audit for a stronger autograd-backed two-block decoder harness.
Fair RoPE/ALiBI/sinusoidal/no-position/PhaseWrap comparisons under the same Stage 45-51 row family.
Separated train/validation/test metrics and failed-run retention before scaling the stronger decoder path.

decision.claim_boundary: The stronger two-block decoder fits enough to pass capacity but does not generalize retrieval.

model.trained_parameters: token embeddings, two q/k/v/o attention blocks, vocab output projection, positional scale
model.value_output_mode: learned vocab softmax, no fixed copy output
